description: Ana Isabel Betz, an oncology infusion nurse, was exposed to Cyclophosphamide during an IV bag rupture, resulting in localized dermal contact on her right forearm. As the occupational health professional, document this exposure in GNU Health. Record the exposure diagnosis, enter a clinical evaluation with vitals (HR 82 bpm, BP 115/75 mmHg, Temp 36.9 C), and order three baseline toxicity labs. Prescribe a topical corticosteroid for the contact dermatitis and schedule a medical surveillance follow-up appointment 7 to 14 days from today. Login credentials - Username: admin, Password: gnusolidario.
